Customer Centered Cloud Engagement (C3E)



Engagement Framework

C3E Framework & Engagement Model 

C3E functions as an end-to-end system aligning engineering, sales, and customer success around standardized engagement practices—designed for continuous improvement and measurable results.

Strategic Engagement Frameworks: Modular, repeatable processes for assessment, architecture, and technical validation, adaptable to customer needs and workload types.

Central Knowledge Platform (Alchemy): A unified repository for account activities, architectural assets, decision records, and analytics—ensuring all teams operate from a single source of truth.

Iterative Feedback Loops: Systematic capture and analysis of outcomes enable immediate adjustments and ongoing refinement based on real-world results.

This integrated structure drives agility, repeatability, and faster time to value for customers – designed to yield better business results for OCI by increasing win rate and reducing customer churn. Visually, this can be represented in the following model.

 

The Framework

There are nine phases in the framework: Qualify, Develop, Discover, Design, Prove, Win, Deploy, Support, and Grow. Each phase has various milestones, with key deliverables/outputs before moving to the next phase. The model is intended to be flexible and meet you where you are at with engaging customers but provide templates of success for each phase. The defined activities are split into two categories: Required & Supporting. Required activities are the output/exit criteria for the phase, and supporting activities help build the deliverable and engage with the customer. Only the REQUIRED activities need updated in Alchemy, however, it is best practice to input all activities when engaging with an account.
